taskapp.description: Node.js/Express + SQLite task management app with JWT auth and WebSocket live sync

weather-website.description: Python/Flask backend + vanilla JS frontend, pulls live weather from OpenWeather API

tic-tac-toe.description: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS browser game, no backend

tourist-safety.description: Node.js/Express app for tourist safety — SOS alerts, live tracking, admin dashboard

student-placement-predictor.description: Student Placement Predictor is a web-based application that predicts a student's placement chances based on academic and skill-related parameters. The system analyzes user inputs and generates placement insights using machine learning techniques. It provides an intuitive interface for students to evaluate their readiness for campus recruitment. The platform also offers personalized feedback and improvement suggestions to help users strengthen their profiles. Designed with a user-friendly interface, it aims to support students in making informed career decisions.
